title: Exposed Administrative Interface
description: An externally reachable administrative interface was detected.
impact: Public administrative interfaces can increase brute-force, credential stuffing, misconfiguration, and direct exploitation risk.
likelihood: Medium to High depending on authentication strength and patch posture.
recommendations: Restrict administrative access to trusted paths such as VPN or IP allowlists.
Enforce MFA and strong authentication controls.
Validate versioning, default credentials, and exposed management functions.
